## MCP ↔ agent-skill parity

- [ ] If this PR adds/changes/removes a ProductClank agent API capability, I updated [`capabilities.json`](../capabilities.json) (status `live` | `planned` | `excluded`) and [`CAPABILITIES.md`](../CAPABILITIES.md) if the table changed.
- [ ] `npm run check:parity` passes locally.
